description:
Deep competitor investigation + full account strategy build for EN & JP, delivered as HTML report.

Phase 1 - Scout Investigation:
- Run scout.py to collect fresh competitor data
- Deep analysis of ALL competitors: growth patterns, engagement rates, posting frequency, posting times, content types
- Analyze post characteristics (AI beauty style, image types, text patterns)
- Profile analysis (bios, positioning, profile photos, background images)
- Engagement tactics (hashtags, replies, outbound engagement patterns)
- Identify what growing accounts do differently

Phase 2 - Strategy Development:
- Build comprehensive EN account strategy from scratch (persona, content style, posting schedule, growth tactics, engagement approach, image direction)
- Build comprehensive JP account strategy from scratch (same depth, adapted for Japanese market)
- Include specific, actionable recommendations backed by competitor data

Phase 3 - HTML Report:
- Compile all findings and strategies into a detailed, well-formatted HTML report
- Include competitor analysis section with data visualizations/tables
- Include EN strategy section and JP strategy section
- Save to data/strategy_report_20260306.html
- Send to operator via Telegram

Expected outputs:
- data/scout_report_20260306.json (fresh competitor data)
- data/strategy_report_20260306.html (final HTML report)

Notes: Operator wants maximum detail and specificity. This is a from-scratch strategy build, not incremental. Focus on actionable insights about AI beauty accounts.
notes: Operator wants a retry of this task — go deep on investigation and be very specific in strategy recommendations. HTML report is the key deliverable. Cover: AI beauty characteristics, post content/frequency, posting times, image characteristics, engagement measures, profile photos/backgrounds/bios, and detailed growth strategies for both EN and JP.
